goal: ①标题栏设备选择器(麦克风+摄像头下拉按钮,通话中立即生效) ②视频通话全屏(隐藏工具栏+返回按钮+退出即挂断)

coverage_checklist.toolbar_buttons: assert: 标题栏有摄像头和麦克风两个下拉按钮
coverage_checklist.device_list: assert: 下拉列出所有可用设备，当前选中高亮
coverage_checklist.camera_switch_immediate: assert: 通话中切换摄像头立即生效
coverage_checklist.mic_switch_immediate: assert: 通话中切换麦克风立即生效
coverage_checklist.fullscreen_hide_toolbar: assert: /video-chat 页面隐藏 Toolbar 和 Sidebar
coverage_checklist.back_button: assert: VideoChat 左上角有返回按钮
coverage_checklist.exit_end_call: assert: 任何方式退出视频通话页都自动结束通话
coverage_checklist.typecheck_test_pass: assert: typecheck 和 test 通过
